name: Foreged Indoor Country Club
address: 5999 Rice Creek Pkwy suite 104, Shoreview, MN 55126
about: Foreged Indoor Country Club is a private golf simulator venue offering 24/7 access to its facilities for members. It features state-of-the-art Trackman iO technology in its hitting bay, providing an ultimate indoor golf experience with access to 350+ courses. The venue operates as a members-only club, designed for golfers seeking a private, country club-like atmosphere without the crowds, complete with a putting green, training aids, and a lounge area. The club model is built around convenience and exclusivity, allowing members to book online for private sessions with no staff present and access via mobile credentials.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman iO technology for accurate simulation
Complete privacy with no staff or other members during sessions
Flexible one-hour booking sessions with online scheduling

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB allowed. Members can bring food or order from nearby restaurant menus. Fridge and microwave available for use.
BYOB allowed. Members can bring their own drinks.

simulator_hardware.notes: Ceiling-mounted unit purpose-built for indoor golf with ultimate technology

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own clubs as rentals are not available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, members can bring food and drinks. There is a fridge and microwave available, and you can also order food from nearby restaurant menus.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: One golfer can complete a round of golf in about one hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, kids are welcome provided they are accompanied by a member. Kids under the age of 16 must be with an adult.
